cc:Work.dc:title: LLM vs VLM vs VLA Architecture Comparison
cc:Work.dc:creator: Shantanu Singh
cc:Work.dc:description: Original comparative diagram of LLM, VLM, VLA (1st gen), and VLA (2nd gen) architectures. Created by Shantanu Singh. All claims cited to primary academic sources.
cc:Work.dc:rights: © 2026 Shantanu Singh. Share with attribution only.

svg.text: LLM BACKBONE — decoder-only transformer, self-attn + MLP × N
Discrete: bin indices, one token at a time (slow, coarse)
Continuous: action chunk, all dims via flow matching (fast, precise) ¹
Note on Flamingo ⁷ — a different VLM not shown above
Uses gated cross-attention layers interleaved within frozen LM blocks. None of the four models above use this mechanism.
[1] Black et al., "π0: A VLA Flow Model for General Robot Control," Physical Intelligence, 2024. arXiv:2410.24164
2nd gen · action expert · stop gradient · flow matching · block-wise self-attn · action chunk output
[2] Brohan et al., "RT-2: VLA Models Transfer Web Knowledge to Robotic Control," Google DeepMind, 2023. arXiv:2307.15818
1st gen VLA · tokenized actions · 256 bins per dimension · same LM head predicts actions
[3] Driess et al., "VLAs that Train Fast, Run Fast, Generalize Better" (π0.5+KI), 2025. pi.website/research/knowledge_insulation
1st/2nd gen terminology · knowledge insulation · stop gradient mechanism
[4] Liu et al., "Visual Instruction Tuning" (LLaVA), NeurIPS 2023 (oral). arXiv:2304.08485
MLP projector · token concat · self-attention as fusion · ViT/CLIP encoder
[5] Kim et al., "OpenVLA: An Open-Source VLA Model," arXiv:2406.09246, 2024.
Vision encoder: DINOv2 + SigLIP · MLP projector · Llama-2 7B · 256-bin action tokenization
Block-wise masking: VLM block → itself; state → VLM+itself; action expert → all
[7] Alayrac et al., "Flamingo: a VLM for Few-Shot Learning," NeurIPS 2022. arXiv:2204.14198
Gated cross-attention interleaved within frozen LM blocks — not used in any model shown above
[8] Beyer et al., "PaliGemma: A Versatile 3B VLM for Transfer," Google DeepMind, 2024. arXiv:2407.07726
Primary source for SigLIP + Gemma architecture used as VLM backbone in π0 and π0.5
